title: File Operations Workbench
concept: A table-led Playground operations workbench where saved objects, transfer rows, Site Manager files, Blueprint JSON, database tools, logs, and a protected live WordPress preview stay visible while import, export, save, and destructive replacement flows mutate the same active Playground state.
focus: stateful ZIP import and GitHub export completion
credible editor dirty and save states
flows: Finish ZIP import end to end with selected archive, validation, replacement warning, progress, updated active Playground identity, temporary storage badge, database size change, logs, preview content, and transfer history.
Finish GitHub export end to end with account connection, repository destination, packaging progress, generated commit result, exported transfer row, object last-change update, and history entry.
Generate ZIP download and database download artifacts with source status, progress, result copy, transfer row state, and history.

Save the active temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination consequences, folder permission, progress, shell title and path mutation, storage badge update, and saved row transformation.
Manage saved and local Playgrounds from the object table with open, rename, delete confirmation, final row removal, active fallback, and local permission reconnect.

Use Site Manager tabs for Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, and Settings while Homepage, WP Admin, path input, refresh, storage state, reset/reload consequence, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip remain accessible.
Edit WordPress files with file selection, dirty buffer, save result, new file, new folder, upload, browse files, and log/history feedback.
Browse a representative Blueprint gallery subset with current categories and search, inspect selected detail, validate JSON, copy link, download bundle, run Blueprint, and update preview state.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview with PR URL input
Gutenberg PR or branch preview with branch input
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with selected source, validation, replacement confirmation, progress, success state, and active identity update
Blueprint gallery categories and search with representative subset labeled 8 shown of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission and reconnect consequence
Save progress with file-copy counts
Saved, local-directory, and unsaved Playground object table
Open, manage, rename, delete, delete confirmation, row removal, and active fallback
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory storage badges
WordPress version, PHP version, language, include older versions, network access, and multisite settings
Destructive Apply Settings & Reset Playground and stored Save & Reload behavior
Site Manager Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Settings, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
File browser create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with validation, copy, download bundle, run, replacement result, and preview mutation
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with warning and result states
GitHub import and Export to GitHub
ZIP import and Download as .zip
Database download and Blueprint bundle portability
Transfer history for imports, exports, downloads, saves, file edits, delete, settings reset, and Blueprint runs
